description.value: Price 14,012 gp; Slot weapon; CL 7th Weight 2 lbs.; Aura moderate evocation APPEARANCE This bladed scarf is made of fine, silvery blue silk. EFFECTS A channelerâs scarf is a +1 mithral bladed scarf. When one is wielded by a spiritualist whose phantom is currently harbored in her consciousness, some of the phantomâs emotional energy is channeled into the scarf. As long as the wielderâs phantom is harbored in her consciousness, once per day she can activate the scarf as a standard action to affect it with a greater magic weapon spell, using the wielderâs spiritualist level as the spellâs caster level. This effectâs duration is equal to 1 minute per the wielderâs spiritualist level. This duration need not be used all at once, but must be used in 1-minute increments. In addition, while the scarf is under this greater magic weapon effect, it gains a single weapon special ability based on the emotional focus of the wielderâs phantom, as though affected by a spirit-bound blade spell. If the phantomâs emotional focus does not have an entry for spirit-bound blade, the weapon gains the heartseeker special ability. This effect does not grant the scarf any other benefits of the spirit-bound blade spell. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 8,512 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells greater magic weapon; Class Features spirit-bound blade, phantom class feature; Special creator must worship the associated deity
